checks.description: sequence_detected may only be asserted when the most recent four data_in bits form the pattern 1001.
checks.pass_condition: For every cycle where sequence_detected == 1, the four-cycle sliding window of data_in ending at that cycle must equal 1,0,0,1.

checks.description: After presenting the exact 4-bit sequence 1001 on data_in, sequence_detected should become high within a conservative observation window.
checks.pass_condition: If data_in is driven 1,0,0,1 on four consecutive cycles, then within the next few cycles (unbounded safe) sequence_detected must be observed high at least once.
checks.trigger_condition: When the four-cycle pattern 1001 has been applied.

checks.description: When two back-to-back 1001 patterns are presented with minimal spacing, sequence_detected should assert twice, each after its respective pattern.
checks.pass_condition: Two distinct high pulses of sequence_detected must be observed, each preceded by its own 1001 pattern, without merging into a single pulse.
checks.trigger_condition: After the second occurrence of the 1001 pattern.
